# Anthropic Official Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **Official Anthropic agentic skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system. It defines the gold standard for Claude-native development and Model Context Protocol (MCP) ecosystems.

## 🛠️ Synced System Capabilities
The following skills are linked directly to the executable `.ai/skills` directory:

### Development & Design
- **frontend-design**: Anthropic's official protocols for building premium UI with Claude.
- **theme-factory**: Specialized system for generating cohesive brand themes.
- **canvas-design**: High-fidelity standards for Claude Artifacts and interactive canvases.

### MCP & Infrastructure
- **mcp-builder**: The definitive guide and toolset for building Model Context Protocol servers.
- **web-artifacts-builder**: Optimized protocols for creating browser-based interactive tools.

### Content & Analysis
- **doc-coauthoring**: Collaborative logic for long-form content generation with Claude.
- **pdf / pptx / docx / xlsx**: High-density data extraction and document generation standards.

## 📥 Execution Protocol
To invoke any of these synced skills within a project, use the corresponding slash command mapped in the system router.
